title: Windows Update history snapshot
description: Lists recently installed hotfixes/updates (Get-HotFix) at agent startup as secondary corroboration of updates applied during enrollment. Complements the live WindowsUpdate watcher — catches updates whose events fell outside the watcher's backfill window. Opt-in: Get-HotFix spawns a PowerShell cmdlet and only reports QFE-registered updates (it misses some cumulative/driver updates and all failures), so enable per tenant after weighing the OOBE cost.
author: Autopilot Monitor
